title: Progress
subtitle: Track weight, measurements, photos, and adherence over time.
photosEmptyDescription: Upload progress photos to compare changes over time.
monthlyOverviewBody: Chart placeholders are ready for a charting library or analytics API. Current mock shows healthy downward weight trend with solid workout adherence.

modal.addPhotoBody: Photo upload will connect to storage later. This demo adds a placeholder.

basic.title: Basic stats
basic.subtitle: This week’s distance, time, and calories from your logged workouts — free for everyone.
basic.emptyHint: Log a session to see your weekly chart fill in.
basic.unlockBody: Weight trends, body measurements, progress photos, and monthly analytics are part of Evolve Pro. Basic stats above stay free forever.
